sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ عُلَا رَسَالَةً بِالْخَطِّ الَّذِي لَا تَعْرِفُهُ فِي دَفْتَرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ula je pronašla poruku napisanu rukopisom koji ne poznaje u svom svesci.
sentences.translationEn: Ula found a message in handwriting she did not recognise in her notebook.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرَّسَالَةُ تَقُولُ: أَنْتِ طَالِبَةٌ مُجْتَهِدَةٌ، اسْتَمِرِّي.
sentences.translation: Poruka je govorila: Ti si marljiva učenica, nastavi tako.
sentences.translationEn: The message said: You are a hardworking student, keep going.

sentences.translation: Tražila je osobu koja ju je napisala.
sentences.translationEn: She looked for the person who had written it.

sentences.arabic: اكْتَشَفَتْ أَنَّ الْمُعَلِّمَةَ كَانَتْ تَكْتُبُ رَسَائِلَ لِجَمِيعِ الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Otkrila je da učiteljica piše poruke svim učenicima.
sentences.translationEn: She discovered that the teacher was writing messages to all the students.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ عُلَا بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَعَمِلَتْ بِجِدٍّ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Ula se osjećala sretno i radila je još marljivije.
sentences.translationEn: Ula felt happy and worked even harder.
